repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #70056 on its existing branch after checkout access is restored. Keep the patch narrow to stale stop-timeout lifecycle cleanup and address the Codex/Greptile race by preventing old timed-out task callbacks from clobbering a replacement task's runtime state.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): recover channel starts after stop timeout
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #70056 on the existing contributor branch.
- Clean up stale stop-timeout state without changing the existing timeout or retry policy.
- Address the Codex/Greptile race by ensuring old timed-out task callbacks cannot clobber a newer channel task's runtime state.

## Credit
This carries forward @garnetlyx's original fix from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/70056.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-channels.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `/review` clean before any merge recommendation
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @garnetlyx and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/70056.
The repaired PR body should note that Clownfish repaired the existing contributor branch and retained the original author's attribution.
